---
title: "Housing Dashboard (Plotly)"
format: html
execute:
  enabled: true
---

## Housing Price Dashboard

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

df = pd.read_csv("../../data/ZHVI.csv")


df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date"])


cities = ["New York, NY", "Los Angeles, CA", "San Diego, CA", "Dallas, TX"]

filtered = df[df["RegionName"].isin(cities)]

fig = px.line(
    filtered,
    x="date",
    y="value",
    color="RegionName",
    title="Housing Prices Over Time"
)

fig
```
